'''pachufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deaconate|deaconate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deaconate|deaconate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pachufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæchifith|pæchifith]] || [[word:pæchifij|pæchifij]] || [[word:pæchifish|pæchifish]] || [[word:pæchifi|pæchifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pachuchufuth|pachuchufuth]] || [[word:pachuchufuj|pachuchufuj]] || [[word:pachuchufush|pachuchufush]] || [[word:pachuchufu|pachuchufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pachufuth|pachufuth]] || [[word:pachufuj|pachufuj]] || [[word:pachufush|pachufush]] || [[word:pachufu|pachufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pachuffuth|pachuffuth]] || [[word:pachuffuj|pachuffuj]] || [[word:pachuffush|pachuffush]] || [[word:pachuffuf|pachuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pachufuthu|pachufuthu]] || [[word:pachufuju|pachufuju]] || [[word:pachufushu|pachufushu]] || [[word:pachufuku|pachufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pachufuth|pachufuth]] || [[word:pachufuj|pachufuj]] || [[word:pachufush|pachufush]] || [[word:pachufu|pachufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pachufuthul|pachufuthul]] || [[word:pachufujul|pachufujul]] || [[word:pachufushul|pachufushul]] || [[word:pachufukul|pachufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pachufuthuthu|pachufuthuthu]] || [[word:pachufujuju|pachufujuju]] || [[word:pachufushushu|pachufushushu]] || [[word:pachufuku|pachufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pachufuthun|pachufuthun]] || [[word:pachufujun|pachufujun]] || [[word:pachufushun|pachufushun]] || [[word:pachufukun|pachufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pachufuthuoro|pachufuthuoro]] || [[word:pachufujuoro|pachufujuoro]] || [[word:pachufushuoro|pachufushuoro]] || [[word:pachufukuoro|pachufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
